publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-10-27 23:05:56 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Professional correspondence, manuscripts by Pearson and Warren; notes; speeches and publications; lecture notes on prices; research material on cream; statistics; notes and drafts and related correspondence on world hunger, the price of gold, and foodstuffs. Also, photographs and slides of Cornell and other scenes and subjects.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Professor of Prices and Statistics, New York State College of Agriculture.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Professional correspondence concerning prices, statistics, and economics; correspondence and notes on the career of George Frederick Warren; mss. by Pearson and Warren; notes on a trip to England and other subjects; speeches and publications; lecture notes on prices; research material on cream; statistics (30 v.); notes and drafts and related correspondence on world hunger, the price of gold, and foodstuffs. Also, photographs and slides of Cornell and other scenes and subjects.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Frank A. Pearson papers, #21-10-453. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Warren G.F.: biography by F.A. Pearson, all notes and 3 editions of final manuscript: Farm Economics Article
Warren G.F.: correspondence with F.A. Pearson only, 1922-1938
James B. Sumner (Nobel Prize Winner) and F.A. Pearson relations, 1954-1955

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Dr. Tucker, General Motors World Index of Wholesale Prices
London trip September 1934, Sir Henry Deterding and Inflation (Shell Oil)

did.unittitle: Warren G.F. and F.A. Pearson: Major Works

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Wholesale prices on U.S. for 135 years monthly
Interrelations of supply and price for Bul. 466
Major project curve in fitting to find a curve that was logical and mathematically correct.

did.unittitle: F.A. Pearson's Lecture Notes on Prices: Gold, Cycles, Cycles Combinations, Cycles-Pepper, Coffee, Cocoa, Livestock
F.A. Pearson's Lecture Notes on Prices: Gold, Cycles, Cycles Combinations, Cycles-Pepper, Coffee, Cocoa, Livestock
F.A. Pearson's correspondence with former Warren students about Warren
Warren's quips collected by F.A. Pearson
F.A. Pearson's Tabulation of Warren's articles
F.A. Pearson's Tabulation of conferences and committees in which Warren participated, 1912-1938

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Pepper: Correspondence with Thomas W. Phelps of Francis I. Dupont and Co., 1941-1947
Leffingwell; J. P. Morgan; I. Bennett, John Scoville, Harding Hoover, Kansas, Keith Murray Ohio Farm Bureau, Frank Platt Paarlberg

F. A. Pearson's works at Cornell
"Farm Economics", edited by: Warren and Pearson
"Farm Economics", edited by: Pearson and Myers
Books By: Warren and Pearson, Pearson and Paarlburg, Pearson and Harper, Pearson and Vial on World Food Prices
Pepper; Interstate Commission-Chicago-North Western Railroad Testimony by F.A. Pearson
Wartime Letters of Corporal F.A. Pearson III to his father and mother

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Index numbers: history: unweights, weighted, old notes
Effect of Prices on Production, Effect of Production on Prices

Published Articles by Warren, Pearson, and both
Prices of dairy products- Pearson and E.E. Vial
